name: The Prototype Factory
description: Drayen's war droid factory must be scouted and its production disrupted before his mechanical army grows too large.
narrativeIntro: The intel from the relay station confirmed your worst fears. Warlord Drayen has commandeered an abandoned Separatist foundry and is mass-producing prototype war droids. These aren't the rusting B1s of the Clone Wars -- they're modern, armored killing machines built from salvaged Imperial tech. Commander Vane has ordered a reconnaissance-in-force. Get inside the factory, assess the droid production capacity, and sabotage what you can.
narrativeSuccess: Sparks fly from the ruined assembly line as you plant the last charge. The factory won't be producing anything for a while. But the scale of what Drayen has built is alarming -- dozens of completed war droids were already shipped out. Among the wreckage, you find shipping manifests pointing to two locations: Drayen's mountain stronghold and a hidden camp where rebel turncoats are being trained. It's time to choose your next target.
narrativeFailure: The war droids prove too resilient, and the factory's automated defenses force your retreat. You managed to damage one assembly line, but the facility will be operational again within days. Worse, Drayen now knows you're onto his operation. The element of surprise is gone.

reinforcements.narrativeText: A newly activated War Droid steps off the assembly line, weapons hot!
A Shock Commando leads a squad of conscripts through the factory's upper level!

objectives.description: Eliminate all warlord forces in the factory.
Recover shipping manifests from the factory office.

objectivePoints.description: Assembly line control panel -- plant charges to disable production.
Droid activation hub -- overload the power coupling.
